about.name: About AIDEAS
about.bio: Tell us what slows your business down — we'll build the automation to fix it. From ready-to-deploy solutions to fully custom systems built from scratch, our team handles the entire process. You describe the problem, we deliver the result.

testimonials.quote_1: We spent 20 hours a week processing emails manually. AIDEAS analyzed our workflow, built a custom automation, and now it runs itself — classification, responses, and escalation. Completely hands-off.
testimonials.quote_2: Our support response time dropped from hours to seconds. AIDEAS deployed an AI assistant that understands our products and handles 80% of customer inquiries without human intervention.
testimonials.quote_3: We needed a content engine, not just a tool. AIDEAS built an end-to-end pipeline — from research to publishing — that runs our social media on autopilot while we focus on strategy.

works.subtitle: 194+ automations ready to deploy
works.title: Solutions Catalog
works.caption: These are just examples. We have 194+ ready-to-deploy automations — and if your need isn't covered, we build it from scratch. Whatever your challenge, we have a solution.

news.subtitle: Real results from real businesses
news.title: Use Cases
news.news_1_txt: From auto-classification to AI-drafted responses, we build systems that manage your inbox so your team can focus on work that matters.
news.news_2_txt: Invoices, contracts, resumes — we build AI systems that read, extract, and organize your documents automatically. No more manual data entry.
news.news_3_txt: We deploy smart assistants on WhatsApp, Telegram, or your website — trained on your business, answering customers around the clock.
news.news_4_txt: We build automated pipelines that research, create, and publish content across your channels. Your brand voice, powered by AI.

contact.subtitle: Have an idea? A problem? A process you hate?
contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.form_message: Describe the problem you want solved — no matter how unique, we'll find a way to automate it
contact.form_success: Message sent! We'll reach out within 24 hours.
contact.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

service_descs.desc_1: Streamline operations with intelligent workflows that handle repetitive tasks, approvals, and data processing automatically.
service_descs.desc_2: Deploy AI assistants that understand your business and respond to customers instantly across every channel.
service_descs.desc_3: Generate, optimize, and publish content across all your channels with AI-powered pipelines that maintain your brand voice.
service_descs.desc_4: Transform raw data into actionable insights with automated reporting, forecasting, and anomaly detection systems.
